zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Preston於1480年出生在英國戴文斯塔福頓時，她的父親Richard Preston26歲，母親Agnes Harrington26歲。她於1494年與Thomas Gould在英國薩默塞特澤亞波洛結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1529年在她的家鄉享年49歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文斯塔福頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Preston于1480年出生在英国戴文斯塔福頓时，她的父亲Richard Preston26岁，母亲Agnes Harrington26岁。她于1494年与Thomas Gould在英国薩默塞特澤亞波洛结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1529年在她的家乡享年49岁，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文斯塔福頓。

nameMeanings.name: Preston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from one of the many places (most notably one in Lancashire) so called from Old English prēost ‘priest’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.
occasionally from Middle English prest + son ‘son of the priest’. Priests were forbidden marriage but many produced illegitimate offspring.

variants.name: Presson
meanings: English (Cheshire and Lancashire): variant of   Preston  .
French: occupational name for a presser of wine or oil, from a derivative of presser ‘to press’.

variants.name: Prestwich
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from a place in Lancashire (now Greater Manchester), so called from Old English prēost ‘priest’ + wīc ‘outlying settlement’, or from other places with the same derivation. Variants such as Prestidge, Prestage, etc., parallel the local pronunciation of the Lancashire name. Compare Preston .

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Christopher
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Preston was born in 1480, in Staverton, Devon, England, her father, Richard Preston, was 26 and her mother, Agnes Harrington, was 26. She married Thomas Gould in 1494, in Seaborough, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died in 1529, in her hometown, at the age of 49, and was buried in Staverton, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Preston est née en 1480, à Staverton, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Richard Preston, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Agnes Harrington, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Gould en 1494, à Seaborough, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1529, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterrée à Staverton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Preston 1480 in Staverton, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Preston 26 und ihre Mutter Agnes Harrington 26. Sie hat 1494 in Seaborough, Somerset, England Thomas Gould geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1529 im Alter von 49 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Staverton, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Preston è nata il nel 1480 nel Staverton, Devon, England, sua padre, Richard Preston, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Agnes Harrington, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Gould nel 1494, nel Seaborough, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1529, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolta a Staverton, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Prestonが1480年にイギリスデボンスタバートンで生まれた時，父Richard Prestonは26歳，母Agnes Harringtonは26歳であった。1494年にイギリスソメルセトセアボロウでThomas Gouldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1529年に故郷で49歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンスタバートンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Preston(이)가 1480년 영국 데폰 스타버턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Preston(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Harrington(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1494년 영국 서머세트 시버루그h에서 Thomas Gould(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1529년 그녀의 고향에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 스타버턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Preston nasceu em 1480, em Staverton, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Preston, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Harrington, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Gould em 1494, em Seaborough, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1529, em sua cidade natal, com 49 anos, e foi sepultada em Staverton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Preston родилась в 1480 г. в местности ставиртон, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Preston было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Harrington, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Gould в 1494 г. в местности сибороую, сомирсет, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1529 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 49 лет и была похоронена в местности ставиртон, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine Preston nació en 1480, en Staverton, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Preston, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Agnes Harrington, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Thomas Gould en 1494, en Seaborough, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió en 1529, en su pueblo, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultada en Staverton, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
